mapper.sql: SELECT u.user_id AS id, u.email, up.name, up.contact AS phone, u.role, CASE WHEN u.is_active = 1 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'INACTIVE' END AS status, DATE(u.created_at) AS hire_date FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id WHERE u.role = 'TRAINER'
mapper.select: ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'TRAINER'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_id, email, role, is_active) VALUES (#{id}, #{email}, 'TRAINER', 1)
INSERT INTO user_profiles (user_id, name, contact) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{phone})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_profiles SET name=#{name}, contact=#{phone} WHERE user_id=#{id}; UPDATE users SET email=#{email} WHERE user_id=#{id}
UPDATE users SET is_active = CASE WHEN #{role} = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE user_id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT cu.id AS crmUserId, COUNT(DISTINCT cma.member_id) AS assignedMembers, SUM(CASE WHEN cfr.status IN ('pending','in_progress') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingFeedback, SUM(CASE WHEN crr.status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingReregistration FROM crm_users cu LEFT JOIN crm_member_assignments cma ON cma.trainer_id = cu.id AND cma.gym_id = #{gymId} LEFT JOIN crm_feedback_requests cfr ON cfr.trainer_id = cu.id AND cfr.status IN ('pending','in_progress') LEFT JOIN crm_re_registration crr ON crr.assigned_to = cu.id AND crr.status = 'pending' WHERE cu.app_user_id = #{appUserId} GROUP BY cu.id LIMIT 1

SELECT u.user_id AS id, up.name, up.contact AS phone, up.tier, up.member_type, CASE WHEN u.is_active = 1 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'SUSPENDED' END AS status FROM crm_member_assignments cma JOIN crm_users cu ON cu.id = cma.trainer_id AND cu.app_user_id = #{appUserId} JOIN users u ON u.user_id = cma.member_id JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = cma.member_id WHERE cma.gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY up.name ASC
